name: gbrowse
description: Fast headless+headed browser for QA, dogfooding, and scraping, driven by Claude.

scripts.vendor:xterm: mkdir -p extension/lib && cp node_modules/xterm/lib/xterm.js extension/lib/xterm.js && cp node_modules/xterm/css/xterm.css extension/lib/xterm.css && cp node_modules/xterm-addon-fit/lib/xterm-addon-fit.js extension/lib/xterm-addon-fit.js
